meaning: n.(西班牙产的)君主白兰地酒,一杯君主白兰地酒
examples: Mr Wiels's Pueblo Soberano party gained 22.6% of the votes in the 2012 election and holds five of the 21 seats in Curacao's parliament.
The state-owned investment fund, known as the Fundo Soberano de Angola, will invest domestically and internationally, focusing on infrastructure development and the hospitality industry.
